title: Pore Cleaning Simulator
description:
Rip out blackheads one after another in this weirdly satisfying pore-cleaning simulator.

Use tweezers to grab each blackhead, find the right angle, and pull it out clean. Rush it and you might fail. Stay precise, upgrade your tools, and go after giant blackheads and rare finds.

Features• Fast, satisfying blackhead extraction

• Simple controls with skill-based pulling

• Giant blackheads and rare blackheads to collect

• Tool upgrades to improve your performance

Controls• Move Mouse: Move the tweezers

• Left Click: Grab a blackhead / switch tools

• Drag: Pull it out

Streaming / Video PolicyStreaming, videos, and commentary are welcome.

- Gameplay videos and livestreams are allowed

- Monetized videos and streams are allowed

- In-game screenshots can be used for thumbnails and video covers

Please include the game title **Pore Cleaning Simulator** in your video title or description if possible.
description_short: Grab, pull, and pop blackheads out. A weirdly satisfying pore-cleaning simulator.
